summary: Unified Sync Configuration Feature Testing Complete - All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. Fixed ImportError in unified_sync.py and added auto_sync_enabled/sync_intervals fields to admin.py models. All 17 backend tests passed, frontend UI fully functional.
backend_tests_passed: GET /api/sync/settings - Returns expected fields: enabled, intervals, current_interval, sync_suppliers, sync_stores, sync_crm
GET /api/sync/settings - User with Enterprise CRM plan gets enabled=true and intervals=[1,6,12,24]
GET /api/sync/settings - Service toggle fields are booleans
PUT /api/sync/settings - Updates service toggles (sync_suppliers, sync_stores, sync_crm)
PUT /api/sync/settings - Calculates next_sync time when interval is set
PUT /api/sync/settings - Invalid interval (3h) is rejected if not in plan
POST /api/sync/run-now - Returns expected structure with status, message, details
POST /api/sync/run-now - Respects service toggles (CRM=null when disabled)
GET /api/admin/plans - Returns plans with auto_sync_enabled and sync_intervals
POST /api/admin/plans - Creates plan with auto_sync_enabled=true and sync_intervals=[1,6,12,24]
GET /api/health - Confirms API is running (scheduler active)
frontend_tests_passed: Sidebar shows 'Sincronización' link with RefreshCw icon
SyncSettings page shows interval selector with 'Cada 6 horas' selected
SyncSettings page shows available intervals badges: Cada hora, Cada 6 horas, Cada 12 horas, Cada 24 horas
SyncSettings page shows service toggles: Proveedores, Tiendas, CRM with switches
Sync Now button triggers sync and shows 'Resultado de Sincronización' section
Sync results show Proveedores, Tiendas, CRM cards with sync counts
Toast notification appears: 'Sincronización completada: X elementos sincronizados, Y errores'
AdminPlans page shows 'Gestión de Planes' with plan cards
AdminPlans form shows 'Sincronización Automática' section (not 'CRM Sync')
AdminPlans form shows toggle for enabling auto-sync
AdminPlans form shows interval checkboxes: Cada hora, Cada 6 horas, Cada 12 horas, Cada 24 horas when enabled
AdminPlans form shows help text: 'Los usuarios de este plan podrán elegir entre estos intervalos para sincronizar Proveedores, Tiendas y CRM'
Plan cards show 'Sync: 1h, 6h, 12h, 24h' when sync is enabled

scheduler_verified.run_scheduled_syncs: Configured in server.py line 101 with APScheduler
scheduler_verified.description: Runs every hour to check user-configured syncs and execute due syncs

bugs_fixed.issue: SubscriptionPlanCreate/Update models missing auto_sync_enabled and sync_intervals fields
bugs_fixed.fix: Added auto_sync_enabled: bool and sync_intervals: List[int] to both Pydantic models

critical_code_review_comments: unified_sync.py properly implements get_user_sync_settings() to check user's plan for sync permissions
run_scheduled_syncs() correctly verifies user plan permissions before executing sync
SyncSettings.jsx properly fetches settings via /api/sync/settings and displays controls based on plan
AdminPlans.jsx properly includes unified sync section with switch and interval checkboxes
Scheduler is properly configured to run unified_sync check every 1 hour
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/admin.py (added auto_sync_enabled and sync_intervals to Pydantic models)

test_credentials.plan: Enterprise CRM with auto_sync_enabled=true and sync_intervals=[1,6,12,24]

seed_data_creation: Tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed plans
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Sync feature is fully implemented and tested. Backend: unified_sync.py handles scheduled syncs, dashboard.py has /api/sync/settings and /api/sync/run-now endpoints, admin.py and schemas.py support auto_sync_enabled/sync_intervals in plans. Frontend: SyncSettings.jsx page shows sync configuration with interval selector and service toggles, AdminPlans.jsx allows SuperAdmin to configure sync options per plan. Scheduler runs every hour via APScheduler job 'unified_sync' to check and execute due syncs.

features_verified.get_sync_settings: GET /api/sync/settings returns {enabled, intervals, current_interval, sync_suppliers, sync_stores, sync_crm, last_sync, next_sync}
features_verified.run_sync_now: POST /api/sync/run-now executes immediate sync for all enabled services
features_verified.subscription_plan_sync_fields: SubscriptionPlan model includes auto_sync_enabled and sync_intervals
features_verified.scheduler_job: APScheduler job 'unified_sync' runs run_scheduled_syncs every 1 hour
features_verified.frontend_sync_settings: SyncSettings page with interval selector, service toggles, Sync Now button
features_verified.frontend_admin_plans: AdminPlans form has unified sync toggle and interval checkboxes
